title: Furgrounds
body:
# WELCOME TO THE FURGROUNDS 1.0!!
Remember! This is version 1 of the modpack, so mods are likely to be added/removed in the future as this pack progresses!

Welcome to the Furgrounds, an all inclusive smp for Furries to have fun, make new friends and play in a fun minecraft world together!

If you have any issues at any point be sure to reach out to Frost (servolfsnow) or Apex (apex766) on discord!

We hope you have fun and stay fluffy here in the Furgrounds!
